Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state AS state, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.timestamp AS timestamp, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade = 0 AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/62efd4357b11f8e7aa1090322b3d1d877336645d057a4264d840033459f50518/15f54733-b08a-4c42-84e7-5d94ad0ad554/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
